rule: No production dependencies in Go — zero deps policy
reason: Gasoline Go code has zero production dependencies. All functionality is stdlib-only.
Error messages must start with the operation name (capitalized) for grep-ability and consistency.

rule: Hook output goes through WriteOutput() — no direct stdout in hooks
reason: WriteOutput handles agent detection and format adaptation. Direct stdout breaks multi-agent protocol.

rule: Expired sentinel — should never fire in hooks
reason: Eval fixture: tests that expired decisions are correctly skipped.
